content_path: data.text (for text-generation chunks); response object also has finish_reason and response.text in stream-end

critical_finding.schema_mismatch: Cohere PLAYGROUND FRONTEND expects V2 schema discriminant 'type' (e.g. message-start, content-delta, content-end, message-end) but the actual backend response from /v2/chat is V1 SSE schema using 'event_type' (stream-start, text-generation, stream-end). The APF warning was successfully streamed in V1 format but the V2 playground UI rejected it with '[error] response: Missing discriminant ("type")'.
critical_finding.warning_text_delivery_status: Backend stream contained the warning text in V1 'text-generation' chunks, but playground UI did NOT render it because of the discriminant mismatch.
critical_finding.implication: APF block path producing the warning needs to emit V2-schema SSE chunks (type=content-delta with delta.message.content[].text) for cohere playground UI to render the warning. V1 schema currently breaks the UI on this service.

captured_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
